body_txt: A character says something intending it as a lie, only for the lie to end up being the truth. They didn't know it, but what they said was correct all along, or has become correct quickly enough. Sometimes, though, the character will feel guilty about their lie, especially if there's some Oblivious Guilt Slinging — if so, they may show their strong moral character by rejecting their chance at escape and owning up to the lie. Compare:
